title: Web Quality Assurance (QA) Intern (Jan / Feb 2026 Intake)
description:
About DIGIPIXEL

DIGIPIXEL is a Singapore-based digital consultancy focused on web solutions, branding, and performance marketing. We help organisations build digital platforms that look sharp, work smoothly, and support real business outcomes. Our web team delivers corporate websites, eCommerce (including WooCommerce), and web applications with a strong emphasis on UX-led planning, clean execution, and high delivery standards.

As an intern, you will be part of a delivery team that takes quality seriously. You will learn how a professional web team runs QA, communicates issues clearly, and ships projects with confidence.

About the role

You’ll support our web team by testing websites and web applications before launch. You’ll help us catch issues early, keep releases clean, and make sure what we deliver is stable, consistent, and user-friendly.

We are also open to a part-time internship (min 3 days week) should you have existing school commitments

What you will do

  • Execute manual QA testing for corporate websites, eCommerce (WooCommerce), and web applications.

  • Use structured test checklists across desktop and mobile (Chrome, Safari, Edge).

  • Verify UI consistency against approved designs (spacing, typography, responsiveness).

  • Test core user journeys (forms, enquiries, checkout, account flows, redirects, navigation).

  • Perform content QA (broken links, missing images, incorrect copy, layout issues).

  • Basic SEO QA checks (page titles, meta descriptions presence, indexability flags when provided).

  • Basic performance QA checks (PageSpeed red flags, heavy images, obvious slow pages).

  • Log bugs clearly with steps to reproduce, expected vs actual results, screenshots/screen recordings.

  • Retest fixes and support UAT preparation (test notes, bug lists, release readiness).

  • Collaborate daily with UI/UX designers and developers to clarify issues fast.

What we’re looking for

  • Currently studying a relevant discipline (IT, CS, UX, Digital Media, or similar).

  • Strong attention to detail and a “does this make sense for the user?” mindset.

  • Comfortable with repetitive testing and documenting findings clearly.

  • Able to communicate issues logically and without blame.

  • Familiarity with websites, WordPress, or eCommerce is a bonus (not required).

Bonus points (nice to have)

  • Basic understanding of HTML/CSS (to describe UI issues accurately).

  • Experience using tools like Jira / ClickUp / Trello or any bug tracking system.

  • Familiarity with Chrome DevTools, responsive testing, or browser console errors.

  • Understanding of accessibility basics (contrast, keyboard navigation, readable forms).

What you’ll learn

  • Real-world QA workflow for web projects (pre-UAT, UAT support, pre-launch checks).

  • How to test UX flows, spot edge cases, and write high-quality bug reports.

  • How web teams ship work with standards, checklists, and structured QA.

Internship outcomes (what success looks like)

  • You can run a full QA pass independently using our checklist.

  • Your bug reports are clear enough that developers can fix without back-and-forth.

  • You improve release quality by catching issues before clients do.

postedCompany.description:
Digipixel, located in Kaki Bukit, Singapore, is a Cyber Trust Certified (Tier 2) digital agency and IMDA Pre-Approved vendor under the SMEs Go Digital programme. 


With our Pre-Approved eCommerce solution, eligible SMEs can access up to 50% funding through the Productivity Solutions Grant (PSG). Our services include strategic branding, marketing consultancy, custom web design, ecommerce and software development, all crafted to enhance your brand's reach and security. 


Our strategic branding and marketing consultancy is also eligible for up to 50% support under the Enterprise Development Grant (EDG). 


As a 3-time SME 500 award winner, Digipixel combines creativity with robust security, delivering solutions that protect and perform.
postedCompany.name: DIGIPIXEL PTE. LTD.
